data.body: Even when I love a TV show, compared to others, I’m a casual watcher. On TikTok I see all kinds of deep dives into hidden meanings and intricate subtexts on The Pitt, Paradise, Buffy, etc. I enjoy these videos, but my hot take usually doesn’t go much further than, “Wow, that episode was good.”
